headline: Lam Research IBM Alliance Targets Sub 1nm Logic And AI Chip Demand
summary: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) has entered a long-term collaboration with IBM focused on next-generation semiconductor technologies. The partnership targets sub-1nm logic scaling through joint work on advanced materials, fabrication processes, and High NA EUV lithography. The alliance aims to support future semiconductor roadmaps and deepen Lam Research's engagement with research partners and customers. Lam Research, a key provider of wafer fabrication equipment and services, sits at the...

headline: KLA Jumps 22% in 3 Months: Is There More Room for the Stock to Grow?
summary: KLAC shares jump 21.7% in three months despite a softer fiscal Q3 outlook, as strong AI infrastructure spending and accelerating advanced packaging demand support growth.

headline: AEIS Soars 98% in the Past Six Months: Is the Stock Worth Buying Now?

headline: Hazeltree Finds Hedge Funds Ramp Up Short Bets Amid Geopolitical Turmoil and Private Credit Concerns
summary: NEW YORK & LONDON, March 11, 2026--Against the backdrop of concerns over a private credit blow-up and ongoing wars in the Middle East and Russia/Ukraine, global hedge funds experienced a slight momentum shift towards the short side than the long side, according to Hazeltree, a leading provider of integrated treasury and liquidity management solutions for alternative asset managers.
